brand.name: Hubenov Deliveries
brand.tagline: Parcels between the UK and Bulgaria — fast, secure, on our own transport

common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

home.hero_title: Your parcels to Bulgaria — in safe hands
home.hero_subtitle: Our own transport from Manchester across Bulgaria. A van every Friday. Delivery to the door or to an Econt office.
home.value_speed_text: A regular schedule — you know exactly when your parcel leaves.
home.value_own_text: We carry to Bulgaria ourselves — no reliance on subcontractors.
home.value_econt_text: Last mile to anywhere in the country — door or office.
home.value_care_text: Gifts and personal parcels for family — handled the way you would.
home.dropoff_text: We accept parcels at the Manchester shop — Mini Market Bulgaria / Bulgarian Bakery Hubenovi.
home.how_1_text: Get a price online and book onto the next van.
home.how_2_text: Bring the parcel to the shop or arrange a collection.
home.how_3_text: Your parcel travels on our van on Friday.
home.how_4_text: Econt delivers to the door or office; you track it all online.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Two directions, door or office delivery, cash on delivery.

quote.title: Instant quote
quote.subtitle: Estimate a price in seconds.
quote.disclaimer: This is an estimate. The final amount is confirmed when the parcel is accepted.

track.title: Track a parcel
track.subtitle: Enter a parcel number to see its current status.
track.not_found: No parcel found with that number.
track.privacy_note: For privacy we show status only — never names or addresses.
track.no_events: No events for this parcel yet.

auth.login_subtitle: Sign in with your phone number — we'll text you a code.
auth.first_login_note: On your first sign-in we create your client profile and OT number.

portal.no_shipments: You don't have any shipments yet.

wizard.title: New shipment
wizard.office_none: No offices found for this search
wizard.name: Name

operator.lookup_not_found: No customer with that OT number.
operator.scan_hint: Scan a barcode or type a number and press Enter
operator.queued_offline: Offline — print queued and will sync.

footer.made: Deliveries between the UK and Bulgaria

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: We're here for any question about your parcel.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: There's a van every Friday. We accept bookings until the published cut-off before departure.
faq.q2: Where in Bulgaria do you deliver?
faq.a2: Across all of Bulgaria via Econt — to the door or to an office.
faq.a3: Yes. Gifts and personal parcels are the core of what we do.
faq.a4: Cash or card at the shop, by bank transfer, or cash on delivery.
